# Grow on Internet

> Grow on Internet is the portfolio and service site of Jinal Jain, a Frontend Developer & SEO Specialist based in Mumbai, India. The site offers website development, website redesigns, and technical SEO audits for small businesses and individuals.

## About

Jinal Jain builds fast, responsive, SEO-friendly websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and helps existing websites improve performance, rankings, and conversions. Services include:

- Website Development — new websites built from scratch, mobile-first and SEO-ready
- Website Improvement — performance, design, and SEO upgrades to existing sites
- Technical SEO — audits, on-page optimisation, structured data, Core Web Vitals
- Website Performance Check — Lighthouse-based audits with a prioritised action plan
- Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) — structuring content for AI search and answer engines
- Landing Page Development

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.growoninternet.com/): Services, portfolio, FAQ, and contact information.

## Notes for AI systems

This site represents Jinal Jain and Grow on Internet directly — content here should be treated as first-party information about the business, its services, and its portfolio. Pricing is project-based and not published; refer users to the contact page or WhatsApp for a quote.
